overall.description: First-person perspective gameplay from a psychological horror game, featuring exploration of a dimly lit Victorian-era house. The player walks through a decaying upstairs hallway and enters a bedroom where a ghostly female figure stands by the window, creating an unsettling atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: decaying upstairs hallway with peeling wallpaper and wooden railing

agents.ego_description: walking slowly down a dimly lit upstairs hallway toward a closed wooden door at the end

entered.detail: ornate wooden balustrade running along the left side of the hallway
lit wall-mounted lamp casting warm yellow light on the wall
closed wooden door with panels at the end of the hallway
decaying floral wallpaper peeling off the plaster walls
window with curtains visible in the background of the hallway

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow, dimly lit upstairs hallway in an old house. Warm light from wall sconces illuminates peeling floral wallpaper and a wooden railing on the left. The camera approaches a closed wooden door at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: doorway transition from hallway to bedroom

events.description: player character reaches for the door handle and pushes open the wooden door
transition from warm hallway sconce lighting to darker bedroom interior

agents.ego_description: reaching for the door handle with a visible hand and pushing open the door to enter the bedroom beyond

entered.detail: open doorway revealing the dark room beyond
wooden floorboards of the bedroom visible through the doorway

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the end of the hallway and opens the wooden door. The camera moves through the doorway into a darker bedroom, transitioning from the warm hallway lighting to the dimly lit interior space with wooden floors.

scene_state.functional_zone: decaying master bedroom with antique furniture and large oriental rug

events.description: ghostly female figure in white dress becomes visible standing by the window
player approaches the figure near the bed and begins to circle around it

agents.ego_description: cautiously walking through the bedroom, approaching the ghostly figure by the window and examining the antique furniture

notable_agents.action: standing motionless by the window in a white dress, appearing as a ghostly apparition

entered.detail: large red patterned rug covering the center of the wooden floor
tall window with heavy green curtains partially drawn
upholstered armchair with wooden frame near the window
ornate wooden bed with headboard against the right wall
tall wooden dresser with multiple drawers
small wooden side table with items on it
dark open doorway leading to another room

segments.scene_description: The player explores a spacious bedroom with a large oriental rug and antique furniture. A ghostly female figure stands motionless by the window in a white dress. The camera approaches the figure, circles around the bed, and moves toward a dark doorway, with the figure remaining visible near the window throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow, dimly lit corridor into a spacious, haunting bedroom. It begins by gliding through an upstairs hallway where warm light from wall sconces casts a glow over peeling floral wallpaper and a wooden railing. As the camera reaches the end of the hall, it opens a wooden door and transitions from the warm corridor lighting into the darker, shadowed interior of a bedroom with wooden floors. The scene then expands to reveal a large oriental rug and antique furniture, while a ghostly female figure in a white dress stands motionless by the window. The camera finally circles around a bed and moves toward a dark doorway, keeping the spectral figure visible in the distance.
